subject: ASoC: samsung: Fix refcount leak in aries_audio_probe
notes: POC verifier OK(F1.acq=1 F1.rel=1 F3.goto=0 F5.ret=2 F2.if=1) on first pass; no POC regenerations.
Adapted lin-1-rep1 query template; replaced hasNullCheck with hasErrorReturnBeforePut to match the error-path-leak structure of aries_audio_probe (null check is on priv->usb_extcon, not extcon_np).
Query fires on aries_audio_probe_buggy line 44 only; _fixed/_fp variants silent.

Note: per-variant tp1/tp2/tp3 use C-initializer style (Variable* n = of_parse_phandle(...)) which doesn't produce an AssignExpr — covered by acquisition on aries_audio_probe_buggy which uses separate assignment matching the seed shape; oracle satisfied (buggy fires & fixed/fp silent).
